jcr:content.jcr:description: AbbVie’s Community of Science connects scientists worldwide to collaborate, innovate, and turn bold ideas into the next generation of medicines.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Community of Science

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: A community built to drive science further

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: AbbVie scientists are taking on some of medicine’s toughest challenges. Together they partner across disciplines and engage in a constant exchange of ideas that fosters a community committed to advancing research.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: We offer initiatives that spark collaboration and accelerate innovation across our global scientific hubs. From speaker series and poster sessions to award programs and networking, ACOS creates opportunities for scientists to engage with each other, test bold ideas and celebrate the power of science.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: This annual event gathers AbbVie scientists from around the world to inspire, discuss and celebrate bold ideas. Our quest to keep exploring and expanding possibilities comes to life at this multi-site event with scientific poster presentations, keynote lectures, patient engagements and networking opportunities.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Established in 1985 and named after Dr. Ernest Volwiler, the annual Volwiler Gala celebrates AbbVie’s most distinguished scientists whose research pushes boundaries and drives scientific excellence.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: The Pathway to Cures program fuels innovation through two key initiatives. In our annual Innovation Challenge, hundreds of AbbVie scientists pitch bold ideas to senior R&D leaders that tackle some of the most challenging diseases. Colleagues from across functions also collaborate in regular hackathons to solve critical questions and advance concepts toward clinical development.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Designed to balance structured learning with cutting-edge research, AbbVie’s Postdoctoral Program provides world-class Ph.D.'s with a premier research environment. The program trains the next generation of scientists while advancing novel, publishable research.

cta.linkText: Learn more about the program and open opportunities
cta.name: Cta

teaser.description: There are countless ways AbbVie’s Community of Science comes together to drive scientific excellence.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: Embracing science and collaboration

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our Annual Women in Science & Engineering event addresses barriers and biases in science, technology, engineering and mathematics (STEM) fields.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Events at local schools are designed to inspire young scientists and attract top talent.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our Science University archive contains over 100+ lectures on a diverse range of scientific topics.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Our internal journal allows scientists to share research findings, methodologies and conclusions so we can build upon existing knowledge and explore new frontiers.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: At AbbVie, science reaches its full potential through people. Be part of a community where your ideas fuel the next generation of medicines.
